name: Luma Health Patient Engagement API
what_it_does: Luma Health REST API for patient engagement and scheduling automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage appointment reminders and patient communications via SMS/email, handle patient self-scheduling and rescheduling, access intake form and patient intake data, retrieve no-show rate and schedule optimization analytics, manage waitlist and cancellation management automation, handle referral management workflows, access patient satisfaction and feedback data, manage telehealth link delivery, and integrate patient communication with EHR and practice management systems.
use_cases: Automating appointment reminders and patient communications from healthcare operations agents
Managing patient self-scheduling from healthcare access agents
Retrieving no-show analytics and schedule optimization from practice efficiency agents
Integrating patient engagement with EHR from care coordination agents
not_for: Non-healthcare businesses without patient scheduling and HIPAA compliance needs
Hospital inpatient without outpatient and ambulatory scheduling focus
Insurance and billing without patient-facing engagement and communication needs
best_when: A medical practice, clinic, or health system using Luma Health wants AI agents to automate patient reminders, self-scheduling, intake forms, waitlist management, referral coordination, and patient communication analytics.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient communications and scheduling data is PHI. SMS/email patient communications must comply with HIPAA and TCPA. Automated appointment messaging must respect patient communication preferences. Intake form data may contain sensitive medical information.

auth.notes: Luma Health uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with scheduling, messaging, and patient scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. EHR integration partnerships (Epic, Athenahealth, etc.). Webhooks for scheduling and patient events. HIPAA BAA required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — healthcare engagement platform pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2015. Leading patient engagement platform. Used by 600+ health systems and practices. $130M raised (Series C 2021). Strong EHR integrations (Epic, Athena, Cerner). Referral management a key differentiator. Competes with Relatient and Phreesia for patient engagement. SMS-first approach.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Patient scheduling and communication data is PHI — BAA required before API access
TCPA compliance required for automated SMS — patients must opt-in to text communications
No public MCP server — API key and OAuth2 REST API with EHR integration partnerships
Automated reminders must respect patient opt-out preferences — unsubscribe must be honored immediately
Waitlist automation must handle patient privacy — cannot expose other patients' cancellations
Referral workflow automation must maintain care coordination audit trail
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient engagement and PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, TCPA. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. SMS patient communication compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient PHI and communication data. HIPAA, SOC2, TCPA. API key and OAuth2. US data residency.
